request_summary: Implement an always-on single dashboard screen plugin for UDash showing Raspberry Pi temperature, tomorrow weather, and upcoming birthdays.

initial_user_goal: One persistent screen instead of rotating plugins
Current temperature from Raspberry Pi internal sensors
scoping_decisions_confirmed: Birthday source: Google Calendar birthdays via ICS URL (easier path)
Always-on behavior: only one dashboard plugin in one all-day playlist

notes: _determine_next_plugin selects due plugin from active playlist
No scheduler core change required for selected approach
Always-on can be achieved operationally via playlist configuration
PlaylistManager determines active playlist by time window
Plugin instances use interval/scheduled refresh semantics
Use render_image with Jinja template + CSS
Display target is 800x480 horizontal by default
Existing plugin supports OpenWeatherMap and Open-Meteo
Tomorrow forecast can be derived from daily forecast arrays
Calendar plugin already uses ICS and recurring_ical_events
Keep plugin uses non-OAuth Google auth; not suitable for contacts birthdays
Direct Google Contacts API would require OAuth2 and new dependencies

summary: Fetches upcoming birthdays from ICS feed using recurring_ical_events

notes: How to get Google Calendar Birthdays ICS URL

checks_run.result: None on macOS dev host (expected non-Pi behavior)

important_change_after_implementation: Current state confirmed: settings.html exists but is empty

future_memory.phase_2_option: If strict Google Contacts birthdays are required, add OAuth2 + Google People API integration instead of ICS.
future_memory.operational_note: For always-on behavior, run one all-day playlist with only this plugin and a 15-minute refresh interval.
